name: Vision Lithium Inc.
summary: Vision Lithium Inc., a mineral exploration company, engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral resources in Qu√É¬©bec, Canada. The company explores for lithium, gold, copper, zinc, and base metals. It holds 100% in the D√É¬¥me Lemieux property with 238 claims covering 11,599.84 hectares located near the town of Ste-Anne-des-Monts, Quebec; the Sirmac lithium property with 25 claims covering approximately 1,108 hectares located in the northwest of Chibougamau, Quebec; and Broadback North property, comprising of 27 claims covering 1,414 hectares located in Quebec. It also holds 100% interests in the Wabouchi propert, which consists of 10 contiguous claims covering 534 hectares located Southeast of the village of Nemaska in northern Qu√É¬©bec; Red Brook property that comprises of 139 claims covering 3,018 hectares located in Northern New Brunswick; Epithermal property, which consists of 96 claims covering 2,083 hectares; and Benjamin property that comprises of 33 claims covering 715 hectares located in Northern New Brunswick; and Godslith lithium property located to the northwest of Gods River, Manitoba. The company was formerly known as ABE Resources Inc. and changed its name to Vision Lithium Inc. in March 2018. Vision Lithium Inc. is headquartered in Val-d'Or, Canada.
